description_en: Kampala may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 6 halal restaurants and 29 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Kampala, Uganda, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Kampala: 6+ halal restaurants, 29 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
